task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Blog with Search** (Level 6)

Build a blog API. Posts table with title, body, author. POST /api/posts creates. GET /api/posts lists all (support ?search= query param for title search). GET /api/posts/:id gets one post. Validate title and body are required, title max 200 chars.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Posts table:
  title, required, max 200
  body, required
  author

# Your endpoints here

```

The app must pass these HTTP te
final_source:
build for javascript backend
database is local memory

create a Posts table:
  title, required, max 200
  body, required
  author

when user sends article to /api/posts:
  validate article:
    title is text, required
    body is text, required
  saved = save article to Posts
  send back saved with status 201

when user calls GET /api/posts:
  posts = get all Posts
  send back posts

when user calls GET /api/posts/:id:
  post = look up Post with this id
  send back post
